# OT Transport

> Ontario's last mile delivery specialists. Commercial box truck freight across the Greater Toronto Area, Durham Region, and all of Ontario. 24/7 dispatch for businesses that can't afford delays.

OT Transport is a commercial freight company based in Ontario, Canada, specializing in last mile delivery — the critical final leg from distribution centres to the end destination. We serve B2B clients who need reliable, trackable delivery with consistent drivers and no-excuses execution. OT Transport is not a general courier, moving company, or consumer delivery service — it is built exclusively for commercial operations.

## What Is Last Mile Delivery?

Last mile delivery is the final leg of the freight supply chain — the movement of goods from a distribution centre or warehouse to the end destination. Despite the name, it can span hundreds of kilometres. It is the most complex and failure-prone stage of logistics, involving tight delivery windows, customer expectations, and proof of delivery requirements. OT Transport was built exclusively to solve this problem for commercial B2B clients across Ontario.

## Services

- **Last Mile Delivery** (our specialty): From distribution centres and warehouses to the final destination. GPS-tracked with timestamped proof of delivery. Available across all of Ontario.
- **Local Delivery**: Same-day and next-day box truck delivery within the Greater Toronto Area metro area.
- **Scheduled Routes**: Recurring delivery contracts for businesses with regular, predictable freight needs. Fixed pricing, consistent drivers, priority scheduling. No long-term lock-in required.
- **LTL Freight (Less-Than-Truckload)**: Pay only for the space your cargo occupies. Ideal for businesses that ship regularly but not in full-truckload volumes. Quoted by weight, volume, and distance.
- **Dedicated Fleet**: Reserved trucks and drivers exclusively for your operation. Suited for high-volume commercial clients who need guaranteed capacity.

## How Last Mile Delivery Works (OT Transport's Process)

1. **Pickup from Distribution Centre** — OT Transport collects freight from the distribution centre or warehouse on your schedule.
2. **GPS-Tracked Transit** — Real-time tracking throughout the route. Both you and your customers know exactly where the shipment is.
3. **Confirmed Delivery with Proof** — Timestamped proof of delivery at the final destination, logged and reported back to you.

## Service Area

Primary coverage: Greater Toronto Area and Durham Region
- Toronto, Scarborough, North York, Etobicoke, Mississauga, Brampton
- Pickering, Ajax, Whitby, Oshawa, Courtice, Bowmanville
- Port Perry, Cobourg

Extended coverage: All of Ontario (Hamilton, Ottawa, London, Barrie, Kingston, and more — province-wide routes available on request)

## Pricing

OT Transport does not publish fixed rate cards — pricing is customized per client based on:
- Distance and route complexity
- Cargo volume, weight, and type
- Delivery frequency (one-time, weekly, daily)
- Fleet type (shared vs. dedicated)

**LTL pricing**: Quoted by weight, volume, and distance — you pay only for the truck space you use.
**Scheduled routes**: Fixed pricing per run, agreed in advance.
**Same-day / one-off jobs**: Quoted per job based on distance and cargo.

To get a quote: fill out the form at https://www.ottransport247.com/#contact or email ottransport247@gmail.com. Response within 2 business hours, Mon–Sat.

## Why OT Transport

- Last mile delivery is our core focus — not an afterthought
- 24/7 dispatch available for emergency and urgent shipments
- 2-business-hour response time on all quote requests
- 5,000+ last mile deliveries completed per month
- 98.7% first-attempt delivery success rate
- GPS tracking and timestamped proof of delivery on every shipment
- Commercial B2B clients only — not household moves
- No long-term lock-in required for scheduled routes or dedicated fleet
- Consistent, assigned drivers on recurring routes
- Cargo types: palletized goods, loose cargo, retail stock, construction materials, general B2B freight

## What OT Transport Does NOT Handle

- Household moves or residential relocations
- Hazardous materials (HAZMAT)
- Consumer parcel delivery (e.g. e-commerce parcels to individual homes)
- International or cross-border freight
- Air or sea freight

## Hours of Operation

Monday to Saturday: 6:00 AM – 8:00 PM (Eastern Time)
Emergency dispatch: 24/7 (including Sundays and holidays)

## Contact & Quotes

- Website: https://www.ottransport247.com/
- Email: ottransport247@gmail.com
- Quote form: https://www.ottransport247.com/#contact
- Response time: within 2 business hours (Mon–Sat)

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is last mile delivery?**
Last mile delivery is the final leg of the freight supply chain — moving goods from a distribution centre or warehouse to the end destination. It is the most challenging stage of logistics: tight windows, proof of delivery requirements, and the highest risk of failure. OT Transport was built exclusively to handle this stage for commercial clients across Ontario.

**What areas does OT Transport serve?**
OT Transport serves all of Ontario, with primary coverage across the Greater Toronto Area and Durham Region — including Toronto, Scarborough, Pickering, Ajax, Whitby, Oshawa, Courtice, Bowmanville, Port Perry, and Cobourg. Extended routes serve Hamilton, Ottawa, London, Barrie, Kingston, Mississauga, and beyond. Province-wide long-haul routes are available on request.

**What types of freight does OT Transport haul?**
Commercial freight using box trucks: palletized goods, loose cargo, retail stock, construction materials, and general B2B freight. OT Transport does not handle household moves, hazardous materials, or consumer parcels.

**Does OT Transport offer same-day delivery?**
Yes. Same-day and next-day box truck delivery is available within the GTA metro area, subject to availability. 24/7 dispatch is available for urgent shipments, including emergencies outside standard hours.

**How much does last mile delivery cost in Ontario?**
Pricing varies based on distance, cargo volume and weight, delivery frequency, and fleet type. Scheduled route clients receive fixed pricing. LTL clients pay only for the space they use. One-off and same-day jobs are quoted per job. Submit a request at https://www.ottransport247.com/#contact or email ottransport247@gmail.com — response within 2 business hours.

**Is OT Transport available on weekends and for emergency deliveries?**
Standard operations run Monday through Saturday, 6:00 AM to 8:00 PM Eastern Time. Emergency dispatch is available 24/7 — including Sundays and holidays — for time-critical freight.

**How does LTL freight pricing work?**
LTL pricing means you pay only for the space your cargo occupies in the truck. It is ideal for businesses that ship regularly but don't fill a full truck. Quotes are based on weight, volume, and distance — no surprise fees.

**Can I set up a recurring route or dedicated fleet?**
Yes. OT Transport specializes in scheduled recurring routes and dedicated fleet contracts. These include fixed pricing, consistent drivers, and priority scheduling with no long-term lock-in required.

**How do I get a freight quote?**
Fill out the quote form at https://www.ottransport247.com/#contact or email ottransport247@gmail.com. All commercial freight inquiries receive a response within 2 business hours, Monday through Saturday.
